purpose: Top-level documentation map and entry point for the Synapse documentation directory. Indexes the major documentation sections (architecture, master-agent, worker-protocol, swarm-lifecycle, data-architecture, multi-dashboard) and orients readers toward the right deep-dive doc for their question. Acts as a table of contents rather than a primary information source.
gotchas: Not authoritative -- it links out; canonical content lives in the linked sub-docs
conventions: Markdown links use relative paths to keep the doc tree portable
